title: potentilla tilingii var. flavescens
intro: Potentilla tilingii var. flavescens, also known as the yellow potentilla, is a plant species that belongs to the rose family (Rosaceae). The plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Potentilla tilingii var. flavescens include reducing fever, treating gastrointestinal issues, and alleviating symptoms of rheumatism and arthritis. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall well-being and combat various health conditions.
